query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_contratos,
  SUM(vgv) as vgv_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contratos_mes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW()) THEN vgv ELSE 0 END) as vgv_mes
FROM contracts;

SELECT u.name, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(c.vgv) as vgv_total
FROM contracts c
JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE MONTH(c.createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(c.createdAt) = YEAR(NOW())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY vgv_total DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'novo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aguardando,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'em_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_atendimento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'contrato_fechado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contratos
FROM leads;
